creator: kevin@bostoncrypto.com
text: I believe the problem was a conflict with another package (either libyubikey or pam_yubico) which installed files to the same location as gnupg.  The problem was only reproducible on systems with both gnupg and the yubikey packages installed.  I have not experienced the problem for several update cycles; I believe it has been resolved by one of the respective package maintainers.
